creator: m.muenz@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 219108
wazuh-agent 4

Patch to upgrade wazuh-agent from 3.13 to 4.0.
This will also fix compile errors for FreeBSD13.

- portlint -A is happy
- poudriere testport runs fine on 12.1 64bit
- poudriere bulk builds a fine pkg and agent can updated in productive environment.
